summary.summary: Remove the unused convertGlucose(profile:glucose:) helper and replace its call sites with direct .jsRounded() formatting. The change deletes the convertGlucose function from DosingEngine and updates DetermineBasalGenerator.swift and DosingEngine.swift to use glucose.jsRounded() and related jsRounded(...) formatting instead of calling DosingEngine.convertGlucose (diff:b772f9e65869, file:262059a15e62, file:eb4ef5443147, commit:bd4079972aac). The PR message states this conversion path was unnecessary because profile.outUnits is always .mgdL and unit tests still pass (pr:gordolio/Trio#1223, pr:nightscout/Trio#1223). The change was merged (commit:beecc0c2c95f).
summary.userFacingImpact: According to the PR text the change removes an unused mmol conversion branch and unit tests still pass, so authors expect no behavioral change for users; the change primarily simplifies reasoning and string formatting in determination/reason outputs (pr:gordolio/Trio#1223, pr:nightscout/Trio#1223, diff:b772f9e65869). Recommend human review to confirm there are no runtime or localization implications not covered by the tests.
